creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
Created attachment 220386
v1

vulkan-headers is a few versions behind upstream to stay in sync with vulkan-{loader,tools,validation-layers}.
Skipping devel/glslang update unless someone can help unbreaking graphics/shaderc.

vkcube, yuzu, mpv --gpu-api=vulkan still work fine on Intel Skylake GT2 (0x1912).
